articles.title: How Anonymous Bettors Cashed In on the Iran Strike, Just Hours Before It Happened
articles.summary: Anonymous traders made massive bets on Iranian military action just hours before Tehran launched its missile strike, suggesting either incredible timing or inside information. The pattern shows how geopolitical prediction markets can become lightning rods for potential insider trading, raising questions about whether these platforms need tighter oversight when national security intel might be leaking into betting pools.

articles.title: What Is Polymarket? The Decentralized Prediction Platform Re-Entering the U.S.
articles.summary: Polymarket, the crypto-powered prediction platform that dominated election betting before getting booted from the U.S. in 2022, is making its way back to American users. The return could shake up the domestic prediction market landscape, giving U.S. bettors access to deeper liquidity and more diverse markets than current platforms offer.

articles.title: A Darkly Modern Guide to Betting on War
articles.summary: War betting markets have exploded in popularity, turning geopolitical conflicts into tradeable assets where you can wager on everything from casualty counts to ceasefire dates. These markets reveal information that traditional intelligence agencies miss, but they also raise uncomfortable questions about whether profiting from human suffering makes us better informed or just morally bankrupt.

articles.title: Bezel CEO Quaid Walker Brings Prediction Markets to Luxury Watches
articles.summary: Bezel CEO Quaid Walker is launching prediction markets focused on luxury watch prices and trends. This creates the first major betting venue for collectibles beyond traditional sports cards and art, potentially unlocking millions in trading volume from watch enthusiasts who already obsess over market movements.

articles.title: What Is Kalshi? The Platform That Made Prediction Markets Legit
articles.summary: Kalshi became the first CFTC-regulated platform to offer legal prediction markets in the US, transforming what was once a gray-market activity into a legitimate financial instrument. The regulatory approval opened the floodgates for institutional money and mainstream adoption, proving that prediction markets can operate within traditional financial frameworks without losing their edge.

articles.title: The ‘Industry’ Season 5 Plot Prediction Market
articles.summary: Someone's running a prediction market on what happens in Season 5 of HBO's "Industry," the finance drama that follows young bankers navigating London's cutthroat investment world. Entertainment betting markets are exploding as viewers treat plot twists like sports outcomes, turning TV speculation into actual money-making opportunities.

articles.title: Kalshi Partners with Luxury Watch Marketplace Bezel
articles.summary: Prediction markets platform Kalshi has teamed up with Bezel, a luxury watch marketplace, in what appears to be a cross-promotional partnership deal. The move signals Kalshi's push to tap into affluent consumer segments who might naturally gravitate toward high-stakes betting on everything from elections to economic indicators.

articles.title: Death to prediction markets profiting on war | Will Bunch Newsletter
articles.summary: Will Bunch argues that prediction markets shouldn't profit from betting on wars and human suffering. The criticism highlights growing scrutiny of betting platforms as they expand beyond politics into increasingly sensitive topics that could face regulatory backlash.

articles.title: 'Stay tuned’: CFTC signals rulemaking push on prediction markets
articles.summary: The CFTC is preparing new regulations targeting prediction markets, signaling a regulatory crackdown is coming. This could reshape how platforms operate in the US and potentially force some markets offshore or out of business entirely.

articles.title: Polymarket Bettors Are Waiting While Khamenei’s Time of Death Debated
articles.summary: Polymarket traders have money tied up in bets on Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's death while officials debate exactly when he died. The controversy over precise timing could determine whether millions in wagers pay out, highlighting how prediction markets get messy when real-world events don't have clean timestamps.

articles.title: US derivatives regulator to advance prediction markets rule soon
articles.summary: The CFTC is preparing to roll out new regulations governing prediction markets in the US. This could either legitimize the industry by providing clear operating rules or crush smaller players who can't afford compliance costs.

articles.title: Rolex Enthusiasts Get Kalshi Contracts to Bet on Watch Prices
articles.summary: Kalshi launched prediction markets allowing users to bet on luxury Rolex price movements, targeting the watch collecting community's obsession with market timing. The contracts tap into a $5B+ secondary watch market where collectors already speculate wildly, potentially creating Kalshi's first truly niche vertical that could attract serious money from wealthy hobbyists.
